name: io.github.Sidd27/infrawise
description: Static infrastructure analysis via MCP: databases, AWS services, IaC, and code patterns.

environmentVariables.name: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID
environmentVariables.description: AWS access key (or use a named profile in infrawise.yaml)

environmentVariables.name: AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
environmentVariables.description: AWS secret key (or use a named profile in infrawise.yaml)
